name: Lissa's Honey Baked Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut onions in half crosswise and place, cut side down, in a 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Stir together remaining ingredients and pour over onions.
4. Cover pan with foil and bake for 1 hour or until onions are tender.
My sister has made this recipe for years. She was named after my Father's mother, and that is where she got the recipe. She shared it with us and we all love it. PLEASE, use a sweet onion!
